{{Quote|Twitch is as quick in combat as I am powerful!|[[Silri]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption">''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''</ref>}}
'''Twitch''' was a [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] who was the champion of the [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] [[Taris dueling ring|dueling ring]]. At some point after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], he was mutilated by the [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsister]] [[Silri]] as a means for the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] to intimidate and gain control of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]].
